code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test07-MAY-2023Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows mild hypoglycemia and low HbA1c, with elevated creatinine suggesting impaired renal function. Urinalysis reveals proteinuria, glucosuria, ketonuria, elevated bilirubin, low specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance/color, indicating possible renal and/or hepatic dysfunction. No evidence of urinary infection. Recommend further evaluation for renal and hepatic pathology and review of glycemic management.
